gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]: Meteoblue disagrees with the rainy baseline. It predicts a dry day. With no data from YR.no and a failed connection with Météo France, Meteoblue stands alone in its sun prediction. Looks like a Parisian spring day is playing hide-and-seek like a cheeky monkey.
